items.name: 3 Day Meal Plan
items.description: Need a boost to get back on track? Our 3 Day Meal Plan is perfect to help you starting eating Fit and feeling great again! Select the plan that meets your lifestyle and goals! Lean Plan – for weight-loss Performance Plan – to maximize an active lifestyle Everyday Plan – for those looking to eat well and improve their general health and wellness **All plans are dietitian approved, include 3 meals + 2 snacks per day, and 2 fresh deliveries per week.** _If you have any dietary preferences or allergies please con
items.simplified_description: A 3-day meal plan with 3 meals and 2 snacks per day for different lifestyle goals.
items.other_info: Dietitian approved; includes multiple plan options
